name: Grandma Weiss's Kimmel Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Tie a small square of cheesecloth and secure it tightly with the caraway seeds.
Alternatively, sew the bag closed to prevent the seeds from falling into the soup.
2. Set aside.
3. In a 2-quart pot, melt the margarine over medium heat.
4. Gradually stir in 1 tbsp flour until light brown.
5. Slowly add 1 cup of water and paprika, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
6. Add the remaining 3 cups of water.
7. Stir together the remaining tablespoon of flour, salt (if using), and egg in a small bowl.
8. Drop the mixture into the soup by teaspoonfuls.
9. Simmer for 15-20 minutes.
10. Discard the bag of caraway seeds and serve.
Serves 4; 65 calories per serving.
